query:
SELECT 
  supplierAccount,
  blitzAccountNumber,
  COUNT(*) AS service_count,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost), 2) AS monthly_cost_saving,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost) * 12, 2) AS annual_cost_saving,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 2) AS monthly_revenue_lost,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue) * 12, 2) AS annual_revenue_lost,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue - monthlyCost), 2) AS monthly_margin_impact,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue - monthlyCost) * 12, 2) AS annual_margin_impact,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS zero_cost_count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT serviceType ORDER BY serviceType SEPARATOR ', ') AS service_types,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN customerName IS NOT NULL AND customerName != '' THEN customerName END ORDER BY customerName SEPARATOR ' | ') AS customers
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra'
  AND status IN ('archived', 'flagged_for_termination')
GROUP BY supplierAccount, blitzAccountNumber
ORDER BY monthly_cost_saving DESC;

  ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost) * 12, 2) AS annual_cost_saving,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 2) AS monthly_revenue_lost,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue) * 12, 2) AS annual_revenue_lost,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue - monthlyCost), 2) AS monthly_margin_impact,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue - monthlyCost) * 12, 2) AS annual_margin_impact,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS zero_cost_count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT serviceType ORDER BY serviceType SEPARATOR ', ') AS service_types,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN customerName IS NOT NULL AND customerName != '' THEN customerName END ORDER BY customerName SEPARATOR ' | ') AS customers
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra'
  AND status IN ('archived', 'flagged_for_termination')
GROUP BY supplierAccount, blitzAccountNumber
ORDER BY monthly_cost_saving DESC;
